element.name: Cloud cover, lowest clouds
element.description: Amount of all low clouds (CL), or -amount of middle clouds (CM) if there are no low clouds. It is registered using a code 0 - 8 describing how many eights of the sky are covered by low clouds (0 = no clouds, 8 = completely overcast. Code -3 or 9 = cloud cover can not be estimated because the sky is obstructed from view because of fog, drifting snow etc. Code -3 is presented as .).

element.name: Fair weather (24 h)
element.description: Fair weather. Daily value: If the sum of cloud cover values at 06, 12 and 18 UTC is 4 or lower the day is defined as a day with fair weather, and the parameter value is set equal to 1. If the sum is higher than 4 the parameter value is set equal to 0.
calculationmethods: The sum of the cloud cover observations at 06, 12 and 18 UTC. The sum should be below 4 (max 24 if all overcast), then it is clear sky weather and boolean is true, that means 1, else 0 (false).

element.name: Fair weather (month)
element.description: Number of days with fair weather per month. The montly value is a sum of daily values (daily value: if the sum of cloud cover values at 06, 12 and 18 UTC is 4 or lower the day is defined as a day with fair weather, and the parameter value is set equal to 1. If the sum is higher than 4 the parameter value is set equal to 0).
calculationmethods: The arithmetic sum of data values or accumulated value in a given period.

element.name: Mostly fair weather (24 h)
element.description: Mostly fair weather. Daily value: If the sum of cloud cover values at 06, 12 and 18 UTC is between 5 and 9 the day is defined as a day with mostly fair weather, and the parameter value is set equal to 1. If the sum is lower than 5 or higher than 9 the parameter value is set equal to 0.
calculationmethods: Summen av observasjonstala vil bli eit tall mellom 0 (heilt klart vêr ved alle observasjonane) og 24 (heilt overskya ved alle). Dersom summen er 9 (maks 24 ved heilt overskya) eller mindre og ikkje høgare enn 4 ved nokon enkeltobservasjon, blir dagen rekna for å vere ein penvêrsdag (=1), eller 0.

element.name: Heat sum, 5 ºC (døgn)
element.description: Daily heat sum. Heat sums are also called growing degree days and are a measure of plant development conditions. The heat sum of a day is defined as the number of degrees the daily mean temperature is above a base temperature (in this case 5 ºC). If the daily mean temperature is equal to or lower than 5 ºC the heat sum is defined as zero.
calculationmethods: Akkumulert avvik over en terskelverdi, over tid. Man tar f.eks. døgnmiddel-lufttemperaturer minus temperatur-terskelverdien, og summerer opp for de dagene lufttemperaturen ligger over terskelverdien. Enheten kalles vanligvis graddager.
